LanguageData.ShuttleBlocked: Vertibird could not land on pad: {0}
LanguageData.MessageShuttleArrivedContentsLost: The vertibird arrived, but since there were no colonists inside, the contents were lost.
LanguageData.MessageMissionGetBackToShuttle: You defeated the {FACTION_pawnsPlural}! Get back on the vertibird to launch it.
LanguageData.CommandShuttleNoPilot: No colonist capable of piloting vertibird. Requires minimum piloting ability of 10%.
LanguageData.CommandRefuelShuttleFromCargoDesc: Refuel the passenger vertibird using chemfuel stored within.
LanguageData.ConfirmLoseShuttle: Reforming a caravan will abandon your vertibird. Are you sure you want to continue?\n\nTo leave with your vertibird, select the vertibird, then select 'launch'.
LanguageData.ConfirmShuttleNotEnoughFuelToReturn:
The vertibird does not have enough fuel to return from this destination. It may be stranded.

You currently have {0} fuel but need {1} fuel for a return flight.

Are you sure you want to continue?
LanguageData.AsteroidLetterText:
You've discovered the location of an asteroid orbiting the planet. It contains significant amounts of {RESOURCE}, and potentially other resources. 

Orbital miners steer valuable asteroids into planetary orbit so that they can be easily mined and sold to orbital traders. You do not detect any signs of life from this asteroid. 

You can reach the asteroid with cargo bots, vertibirds, or a gravship.
